summary: Quick Launch Flow and UX Improvements Testing - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED WORKING. Tested 3-click launch flow, score tooltips, £ currency, supplier section cleanup, and trend alert labels.

issues: Console shows Mixed Content warnings for notifications endpoint (http vs https) - does not affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Quick Launch Flow features verified working: (1) 3-click launch widget at top of dashboard, (2) Product shows with £ prices and 'Our #1 Pick' badge, (3) Pick This → Create Shop → Make Ads flow completes successfully, (4) Supplier section shows £ prices with no external links, (5) Score cards have Info tooltips with plain English descriptions, (6) Trend Alerts use 'Recommended/Top Pick/Worth a Look' instead of 'Critical/High/Medium'. The Mixed Content warning for notifications endpoint is a known minor issue.
